name: Alcoa Corporation
description: Alcoa Corporation is a global industry leader in bauxite, alumina, and aluminum products, with a vision to reinvent the aluminum industry for a sustainable future. With a history of innovation that includes the discovery of the process that made aluminum a vital part of modern life, Alcoa operates across the entire value chain, from mining and refining to smelting and casting. The company is committed to environmental excellence and social responsibility, providing high-quality products to various sectors including aerospace, automotive, and construction while advancing technologies to reduce carbon emissions in the production process.
